en: What's your favorite STD? My favorite STD? Great question.
ko: 좋아하는 성병이 뭐야? 내가 좋아하는 성병? 좋은 질문이네.

en: It's hard to pick, isn't it? I mean, chlamydia. Chlamydia is the gold standard.
I remember a friend of mine who's a doctor telling me chlamydia, oh, it's got no symptoms for men and it can make women infertile.
ko: 의사인 친구가 클라미디아는 남자는 증상이 없고 여자는 불임이 될 수 있다고 했거든.
